info.name: Laravel API Project Collection
info.description: Full project collection generated from the live api/v1 routes plus the detailed attendance and teacher flows already maintained in this repository.

item.name: Admin Attendance & Setup
item.description: Detailed admin attendance flow maintained manually for realistic setup and attendance recording.

request.description: Login and save the JWT access token plus refresh token into collection variables.
Lists majors and stores the first major id into {{majorId}}.
Lists classes and stores the first class id into {{classId}}.
Lists subjects assigned to the selected class slot based on its major, year level, and semester.
Assigns an existing subject to the selected class URL. The backend derives major, year level, and semester from the class.
Lists students in the selected class and stores the first student id into {{studentId}}.
Lists available subjects for the selected major and stores the first subject id into {{subjectId}}.
Bulk upsert attendance rows. Change status values to Present, Absent, Late, or Excused.

item.name: Attendance Report By Major And Subject

request.description: Returns a table-ready student attendance report with summary counts such as present, absent, and late.

item.name: Teacher Module
item.description: Detailed teacher registration, OTP, login, and teacher attendance flow maintained manually.

request.description: Teacher self registration. Enable the image field and choose a file if you want to upload a profile image.
Set {{teacherOtpCode}} first. In this project OTP may be logged instead of emailed if MAIL_MAILER=log.
Returns the teacher major, subject, and only the classes valid for attendance based on major_subjects mappings.
Lists all classes in the teacher major. Use Attendance Options when you need only classes valid for the teacher subject.
Lists students in the teacher major. Keep class_id if you want the result limited to a selected class.
Creates an attendance session only if the selected class belongs to the teacher major and the teacher subject is assigned to that class year and semester.
Bulk upsert attendance rows. Valid status values: Present, Absent, Late, Excused.

item.name: All API Routes
item.description: Auto-generated from php artisan route:list --json. Covers every declared api/v1 route, grouped by the first route segment.
